title: My favorite spoon
summary: Describe your favourite spoon — what it looks like, where it came from, and why you like it.
prompt: Write 6–8 short sentences about a spoon you use often at home. Describe what it looks like, where you got it, and why you like it. Use present simple.
hintStarters: I have a favourite spoon in my kitchen. It is…
I use this spoon every day when I…
sampleText: I have a favourite spoon that I use every day. It is a large wooden spoon with a long handle. The wood is light brown and very smooth. I use this spoon to stir my porridge every morning. The bowl of the spoon is quite deep, so it holds a lot. There is a small scratch on the handle, but I do not mind. My grandmother gave me this spoon when I moved to my flat in Warsaw. She said it was from her kitchen. I keep the spoon in the drawer next to the cooker. Every time I take it out, I think of her. I also use the spoon to taste soup when I cook in the evenings. Other people in my flat have metal spoons, but I prefer my wooden one. The spoon feels good in my hand. It is old but it is still my favourite thing in the kitchen.

sampleAnnotations.meaningVi: khuấy cháo yến mạch của tôi
tặng cho tôi chiếc muỗng này

sampleAnnotations.phrase: in the drawer next to the cooker

sampleAnnotations.meaningVi: thích cái bằng gỗ của tôi hơn
có cảm giác tốt trong tay tôi

sampleGrammarNotes.title: Present simple for routines
sampleGrammarNotes.bodyVi: Dùng thì hiện tại đơn để mô tả những việc bạn làm thường xuyên: 'I use this spoon every day', 'I keep the spoon in the drawer'.
sampleGrammarNotes.bodyEn: Use the present simple for things you do regularly: 'I use this spoon every day', 'I keep the spoon in the drawer'.

sampleTranslationVi: Tôi có một chiếc muỗng yêu thích mà tôi dùng mỗi ngày. Đó là một chiếc muỗng gỗ lớn với cán dài. Gỗ có màu nâu nhạt và rất nhẵn. Tôi dùng chiếc muỗng này để khuấy cháo yến mạch mỗi sáng. Phần lõm của muỗng khá sâu nên chứa được nhiều. Có một vết xước nhỏ trên cán nhưng tôi không bận tâm. Bà ngoại tôi tặng chiếc muỗng này khi tôi dọn vào căn hộ ở Warsaw. Bà nói nó từ bếp của bà. Tôi giữ muỗng trong ngăn kéo cạnh bếp. Mỗi lần lấy ra tôi lại nghĩ đến bà. Tôi cũng dùng muỗng để nếm súp khi nấu ăn buổi tối. Những người khác trong căn hộ của tôi có muỗng kim loại, nhưng tôi thích chiếc bằng gỗ của mình hơn. Cầm muỗng trong tay rất thoải mái. Nó cũ rồi nhưng vẫn là thứ tôi yêu thích nhất trong bếp.

mcQuestions.prompt: What is the writer's favourite spoon made of?
mcQuestions.explanation: The text says 'It is a large wooden spoon'.
mcQuestions.hint: Look for the material the spoon is made from.

mcQuestions.prompt: What does the writer use the spoon for every morning?
mcQuestions.explanation: The text says 'I use this spoon to stir my porridge every morning'.
mcQuestions.hint: Look for the morning food the writer mentions.

mcQuestions.prompt: Who gave the writer the spoon?
mcQuestions.explanation: The text says 'My grandmother gave me this spoon'.
mcQuestions.hint: Find the family member who gave the spoon.

mcQuestions.prompt: Where does the writer keep the spoon?
options: In the drawer next to the cooker
In a cup on the counter
mcQuestions.explanation: The text says 'I keep the spoon in the drawer next to the cooker'.
mcQuestions.hint: Look for the location where the spoon is stored.

mcQuestions.prompt: What does the writer think of when taking the spoon out?
mcQuestions.explanation: The text says 'Every time I take it out, I think of her' — referring to the grandmother.
mcQuestions.hint: Look for who the writer thinks about when using the spoon.

mcQuestions.prompt: Which sentence is in the correct present simple form?
options: She use the spoon every day.
She uses the spoon every day.
She is use the spoon every day.
She using the spoon every day.
mcQuestions.explanation: Third person singular present simple adds -s to the verb: 'she uses'.
mcQuestions.hint: Check the correct verb form for 'she'.

mcQuestions.prompt: What does the writer also do with the spoon in the evenings?
mcQuestions.explanation: The text says 'I also use the spoon to taste soup when I cook in the evenings'.
mcQuestions.hint: Look for the evening cooking activity.

mcQuestions.prompt: What small defect does the spoon have?
options: A small scratch on the handle
mcQuestions.explanation: The text says 'There is a small scratch on the handle'.
mcQuestions.hint: Find the word that describes the slight damage.

mcQuestions.prompt: What preposition fits: 'The spoon is ___ the drawer'?
mcQuestions.explanation: Things inside a container or enclosed space use 'in': 'in the drawer'.
mcQuestions.hint: Think about the correct preposition for something inside a drawer.

mcQuestions.prompt: How does the writer describe the spoon at the end?
mcQuestions.explanation: The text says 'It is old but it is still my favourite thing in the kitchen'.
mcQuestions.hint: Look for the two adjectives used to describe the spoon in the last sentences.

criticalThinkingQuestion: Why can a simple object like a spoon become something special to a person? What makes everyday things meaningful?
